name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY (Sample Record)
description: Sample catalogue record for checking health-assurance eligibility through the official PM-JAY portal.

benefit.amount: Up to INR 5 lakh per family per year
benefit.description: Coverage is subject to beneficiary and treatment eligibility.

other_conditions: Beneficiary eligibility must be confirmed through the official system.

ai_explanation.summary: This sample directs eligible families to verify coverage through PM-JAY.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Use the official beneficiary search before visiting a hospital.

name: Ayushman Bharat Digital Health ID Guidance (Sample Record)
description: Sample catalogue record for people seeking digital-health identity and record-management guidance.

ai_explanation.summary: This sample is relevant to citizens seeking official digital-health services.

tips: Use a mobile number you can verify.
